code: import{useMemo}from"react";import{useAuth}from"../context/AuthContext";import{hasAction as checkAction,hasModuleAccess as checkModuleAccess,isMainAdmin as checkMainAdmin}from"../constants/permissions";export const usePermissions=()=>{const{user}=useAuth();return useMemo(()=>({user,isMainAdmin:checkMainAdmin(user),canAccess:module=>checkModuleAccess(user,module),can:(module,action)=>checkAction(user,module,action)}),[user]);};
